name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Retract scapula, slight arch, bar touches lower chest. Elbows 45-75° from torso.
tips: Retract scapula, slight arch, bar touches lower chest. Elbows 45-75° from torso.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Greater ROM than barbell. Control the descent, press in a slight arc.
tips: Greater ROM than barbell. Control the descent, press in a slight arc.

name: Incline Barbell Press
instructions: 30-45° incline. Bar touches upper chest. Don't flare elbows excessively.
tips: 30-45° incline. Bar touches upper chest. Don't flare elbows excessively.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: 30-45° bench. Full stretch at the bottom, explosive press.
tips: 30-45° bench. Full stretch at the bottom, explosive press.

name: Decline Bench Press
instructions: Decline targets lower pecs. Don't overdo the decline angle.
tips: Decline targets lower pecs. Don't overdo the decline angle.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Slight bend in elbows, wide arc, feel the chest stretch at the bottom.
tips: Slight bend in elbows, wide arc, feel the chest stretch at the bottom.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Set cables at shoulder height. Slight elbow bend. Squeeze at peak contraction.
tips: Set cables at shoulder height. Slight elbow bend. Squeeze at peak contraction.

name: Low-to-High Cable Fly
instructions: Cables set low. Pull upward and inward to target upper pecs.
tips: Cables set low. Pull upward and inward to target upper pecs.

name: High-to-Low Cable Fly
instructions: Cables set high. Pull downward and inward to target lower pecs.
tips: Cables set high. Pull downward and inward to target lower pecs.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Straight line head to heels. Elbows 45° from body. Full ROM.
tips: Straight line head to heels. Elbows 45° from body. Full ROM.

name: Wide-Grip Push-Up
instructions: Hands wider than shoulder width to emphasize chest.
tips: Hands wider than shoulder width to emphasize chest.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Hands form a diamond shape. Primarily hits triceps, secondary chest.
tips: Hands form a diamond shape. Primarily hits triceps, secondary chest.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: Lean forward to shift emphasis to chest over triceps.
tips: Lean forward to shift emphasis to chest over triceps.

name: Pec Deck Machine
instructions: Keep elbows at shoulder height. Full stretch and full squeeze.
tips: Keep elbows at shoulder height. Full stretch and full squeeze.

name: Smith Machine Bench Press
instructions: Fixed bar path. Good for beginners. Lower to chest, full press.
tips: Fixed bar path. Good for beginners. Lower to chest, full press.

name: Svend Press
instructions: Press two plates together while extending arms. Constant tension on chest.
tips: Press two plates together while extending arms. Constant tension on chest.

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Single arm or both. Arc motion from chest to full extension.
tips: Single arm or both. Arc motion from chest to full extension.

name: Guillotine Press
instructions: Bar lowered to neck/upper chest. Maximum pec stretch. Use a spotter.
tips: Bar lowered to neck/upper chest. Maximum pec stretch. Use a spotter.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Neutral spine throughout. Bar over mid-foot. Drive floor away.
tips: Neutral spine throughout. Bar over mid-foot. Drive floor away.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips, soft knees. Bar drags down shins. Feel hamstring stretch.
tips: Hinge at hips, soft knees. Bar drags down shins. Feel hamstring stretch.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance, toes out. Hips hinge, torso more upright than conventional.
tips: Wide stance, toes out. Hips hinge, torso more upright than conventional.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Dead hang start. Lead with chest. Full ROM from dead hang to chin over bar.
tips: Dead hang start. Lead with chest. Full ROM from dead hang to chin over bar.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Supinated grip. More biceps involvement than pull-ups. Chin clears bar.
tips: Supinated grip. More biceps involvement than pull-ups. Chin clears bar.

name: Wide-Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Wider grip emphasizes outer lats. Pull elbows to sides.
tips: Wider grip emphasizes outer lats. Pull elbows to sides.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Pull bar to upper chest. Lean back slightly. Elbows down and back.
tips: Pull bar to upper chest. Lean back slightly. Elbows down and back.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: V-bar attachment. Elbows travel closer to torso. Greater contraction.
tips: V-bar attachment. Elbows travel closer to torso. Greater contraction.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Pull elbows past torso. Squeeze shoulder blades at peak.
tips: Pull elbows past torso. Squeeze shoulder blades at peak.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
instructions: Hinge 45°. Pull bar to lower chest. Squeeze rhomboids.
tips: Hinge 45°. Pull bar to lower chest. Squeeze rhomboids.

name: Pendlay Row
instructions: Bar resets on floor each rep. Explosive pull to lower chest.
tips: Bar resets on floor each rep. Explosive pull to lower chest.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Brace on bench. Row elbow past hip. Full stretch at bottom.
tips: Brace on bench. Row elbow past hip. Full stretch at bottom.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle bar. Pull to chest. Keep back flat throughout.
tips: Straddle bar. Pull to chest. Keep back flat throughout.

name: Chest-Supported Row
instructions: Chest on incline bench eliminates cheating. Pure back work.
tips: Chest on incline bench eliminates cheating. Pure back work.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Rope attachment at face level. Pull to face, flare elbows high.
tips: Rope attachment at face level. Pull to face, flare elbows high.

name: Hyperextension
instructions: Hinge at hips. Don't hyperextend the lumbar. Controlled movement.
tips: Hinge at hips. Don't hyperextend the lumbar. Controlled movement.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Bar on upper back, hinge forward until back is parallel to floor.
tips: Bar on upper back, hinge forward until back is parallel to floor.

name: Single-Arm Cable Row
instructions: Unilateral. Full stretch each rep. Rotate torso slightly for range.
tips: Unilateral. Full stretch each rep. Rotate torso slightly for range.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Set bar low. Pull chest to bar. Keep body rigid like a reverse push-up.
tips: Set bar low. Pull chest to bar. Keep body rigid like a reverse push-up.

name: Meadows Row
instructions: Landmine setup. Stagger stance, row to hip. Huge lat stretch.
tips: Landmine setup. Stagger stance, row to hip. Huge lat stretch.

name: Cable Pullover
instructions: Straight arms, pull cable from overhead to hips. Rib cage expansion.
tips: Straight arms, pull cable from overhead to hips. Rib cage expansion.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
instructions: Lie across bench. Arc dumbbell overhead with slight elbow bend.
tips: Lie across bench. Arc dumbbell overhead with slight elbow bend.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Bar on traps. Chest up. Knees track toes. Depth below parallel.
tips: Bar on traps. Chest up. Knees track toes. Depth below parallel.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Bar in front rack. Elbows high. More upright torso than back squat.
tips: Bar in front rack. Elbows high. More upright torso than back squat.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold dumbbell at chest. Elbows inside knees at bottom. Great for beginners.
tips: Hold dumbbell at chest. Elbows inside knees at bottom. Great for beginners.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder-width. Don't lock knees. Full ROM. Keep back flat on pad.
tips: Feet shoulder-width. Don't lock knees. Full ROM. Keep back flat on pad.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Feet forward on platform. Similar to front squat. Control descent.
tips: Feet forward on platform. Similar to front squat. Control descent.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot elevated. Keep front shin vertical. Lunge straight down.
tips: Rear foot elevated. Keep front shin vertical. Lunge straight down.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Control the descent. Peak contraction at top. Don't use momentum.
tips: Control the descent. Peak contraction at top. Don't use momentum.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Don't let hips rise off pad. Full ROM. Slow eccentric.
tips: Don't let hips rise off pad. Full ROM. Slow eccentric.

name: Romanian Deadlift (DB)
instructions: Dumbbells hang in front. Hinge at hips. Hamstring stretch each rep.
tips: Dumbbells hang in front. Hinge at hips. Hamstring stretch each rep.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
instructions: Minimal knee bend. Emphasizes hamstrings. Don't round lower back.
tips: Minimal knee bend. Emphasizes hamstrings. Don't round lower back.

name: Nordic Curl
instructions: Secure ankles. Lower torso to floor slowly. Extremely difficult.
tips: Secure ankles. Lower torso to floor slowly. Extremely difficult.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Bar on hips with pad. Chin tucked. Full hip extension at top.
tips: Bar on hips with pad. Chin tucked. Full hip extension at top.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Feet flat, push hips to ceiling. Squeeze glutes at top.
tips: Feet flat, push hips to ceiling. Squeeze glutes at top.

name: Cable Kickback
instructions: Lean forward slightly. Kick leg back to hip height. Squeeze at top.
tips: Lean forward slightly. Kick leg back to hip height. Squeeze at top.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Full ROM. Pause at bottom for stretch. 2-second hold at top.
tips: Full ROM. Pause at bottom for stretch. 2-second hold at top.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Targets soleus. Knee at 90°. Full ROM.
tips: Targets soleus. Knee at 90°. Full ROM.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
instructions: Bent-over position. Maximum gastrocnemius stretch.
tips: Bent-over position. Maximum gastrocnemius stretch.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Long stride. Front knee tracks over toe. Torso upright.
tips: Long stride. Front knee tracks over toe. Torso upright.

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Step back. More stable than forward lunge. Less knee stress.
tips: Step back. More stable than forward lunge. Less knee stress.

name: Lateral Lunge
instructions: Step to the side. Push hips back. Stretch inner thigh.
tips: Step to the side. Push hips back. Stretch inner thigh.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Full foot on box. Drive through heel. Don't bounce.
tips: Full foot on box. Drive through heel. Don't bounce.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Athletic stance. Explosive jump. Land softly with bent knees.
tips: Athletic stance. Explosive jump. Land softly with bent knees.

name: Sissy Squat
instructions: Lean back, knees go forward. Extreme quad isolation. Use support.
tips: Lean back, knees go forward. Extreme quad isolation. Use support.

name: Sumo Squat
instructions: Wide stance, toes out. Targets inner thighs and glutes.
tips: Wide stance, toes out. Targets inner thighs and glutes.

name: Pistol Squat
instructions: Single leg squat to full depth. Use support while learning.
tips: Single leg squat to full depth. Use support while learning.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
instructions: Bar from front rack. Press overhead. Bar path slightly back around head.
tips: Bar from front rack. Press overhead. Bar path slightly back around head.

name: Seated Dumbbell Press
instructions: Back supported. Press to full lockout. Control descent.
tips: Back supported. Press to full lockout. Control descent.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Rotate palms outward as you press up. Reverse on way down.
tips: Rotate palms outward as you press up. Reverse on way down.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Slight forward lean. Lead with elbows. Pinky slightly up at top.
tips: Slight forward lean. Lead with elbows. Pinky slightly up at top.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Cable from low position. Constant tension unlike dumbbells.
tips: Cable from low position. Constant tension unlike dumbbells.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Arms straight or slight bend. Lift to shoulder height. Don't swing.
tips: Arms straight or slight bend. Lift to shoulder height. Don't swing.

name: Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge forward. Arms arc up like opening wings. Slight elbow bend.
tips: Hinge forward. Arms arc up like opening wings. Slight elbow bend.

name: Reverse Pec Deck
instructions: Facing into pad. Arms wide. Full squeeze at peak contraction.
tips: Facing into pad. Arms wide. Full squeeze at peak contraction.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Rope at face height. Pull to forehead. Elbows flare high.
tips: Rope at face height. Pull to forehead. Elbows flare high.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Pull bar to chin. Elbows above wrists. Avoid if shoulder issues.
tips: Pull bar to chin. Elbows above wrists. Avoid if shoulder issues.

name: Shrug
instructions: Hold bar in front. Shrug straight up. Don't roll shoulders.
tips: Hold bar in front. Shrug straight up. Don't roll shoulders.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Same as barbell shrug. Dumbbells allow more natural movement.
tips: Same as barbell shrug. Dumbbells allow more natural movement.

name: Pike Push-Up
instructions: Hips high, hands near feet. Lower head to floor between hands.
tips: Hips high, hands near feet. Lower head to floor between hands.

name: Handstand Push-Up
instructions: Against wall. Full ROM. Elbows travel out like overhead press.
tips: Against wall. Full ROM. Elbows travel out like overhead press.

name: Behind-the-Neck Press
instructions: High flexibility required. Bar behind neck. Avoid with shoulder issues.
tips: High flexibility required. Bar behind neck. Avoid with shoulder issues.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Full extension at bottom. Supinate at top. Don't swing.
tips: Full extension at bottom. Supinate at top. Don't swing.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Alternate or simultaneous. Supinate as you curl. Full ROM.
tips: Alternate or simultaneous. Supinate as you curl. Full ROM.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Neutral grip throughout. Targets brachialis and brachioradialis.
tips: Neutral grip throughout. Targets brachialis and brachioradialis.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Reclined on incline bench. Arms hang fully. Maximum stretch.
tips: Reclined on incline bench. Arms hang fully. Maximum stretch.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Elbow braced on inner thigh. Pure bicep isolation. No cheating.
tips: Elbow braced on inner thigh. Pure bicep isolation. No cheating.

name: Spider Curl
instructions: Chest on incline bench edge. Arms hang. Maximum short head stretch.
tips: Chest on incline bench edge. Arms hang. Maximum short head stretch.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Constant cable tension throughout. Use straight bar or EZ bar.
tips: Constant cable tension throughout. Use straight bar or EZ bar.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
instructions: Angled grip reduces wrist strain. Great for volume work.
tips: Angled grip reduces wrist strain. Great for volume work.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Arm braced on pad. Eliminates momentum. Full extension.
tips: Arm braced on pad. Eliminates momentum. Full extension.

name: 21s
instructions: 7 bottom half, 7 top half, 7 full reps. Time under tension technique.
tips: 7 bottom half, 7 top half, 7 full reps. Time under tension technique.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Elbows pinned to sides. Full extension. Don't swing.
tips: Elbows pinned to sides. Full extension. Don't swing.

name: Rope Pushdown
instructions: Rope splits at bottom for full contraction. Flare wrists out.
tips: Rope splits at bottom for full contraction. Flare wrists out.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lower bar to forehead slowly. Keep elbows pointing up.
tips: Lower bar to forehead slowly. Keep elbows pointing up.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Upright torso hits triceps. Slight forward lean hits chest.
tips: Upright torso hits triceps. Slight forward lean hits chest.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Hands shoulder-width. Elbows travel close to body. Full lockout.
tips: Hands shoulder-width. Elbows travel close to body. Full lockout.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Arms overhead, lower behind head. Maximum long head stretch.
tips: Arms overhead, lower behind head. Maximum long head stretch.

name: Cable Overhead Extension
instructions: Face away from stack. Rope overhead. Full stretch and extension.
tips: Face away from stack. Rope overhead. Full stretch and extension.

name: Reverse Curl
instructions: Pronated grip. Targets brachioradialis and forearms.
tips: Pronated grip. Targets brachioradialis and forearms.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Forearms on bench. Curl wrists up. Slow controlled movement.
tips: Forearms on bench. Curl wrists up. Slow controlled movement.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
instructions: Pronated grip. Extend wrists upward. Targets extensor muscles.
tips: Pronated grip. Extend wrists upward. Targets extensor muscles.

name: Plank
instructions: Neutral spine. Squeeze glutes. Don't let hips sag or pike.
tips: Neutral spine. Squeeze glutes. Don't let hips sag or pike.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Hips stacked. Don't let them drop. Maintain a straight line.
tips: Hips stacked. Don't let them drop. Maintain a straight line.

name: Crunch
instructions: Don't pull on neck. Roll shoulders up. Short range of motion.
tips: Don't pull on neck. Roll shoulders up. Short range of motion.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Opposite elbow to knee. Extend other leg. Controlled rotation.
tips: Opposite elbow to knee. Extend other leg. Controlled rotation.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Feet off floor for harder version. Rotate fully each side.
tips: Feet off floor for harder version. Rotate fully each side.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Dead hang. Posterior pelvic tilt at top. Control the descent.
tips: Dead hang. Posterior pelvic tilt at top. Control the descent.

name: Toes-to-Bar
instructions: From dead hang, bring toes to bar. Don't swing.
tips: From dead hang, bring toes to bar. Don't swing.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Extend fully. Engage abs completely before rolling back. Don't let back sag.
tips: Extend fully. Engage abs completely before rolling back. Don't let back sag.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel. Pull rope to floor. Round spine completely. Don't use hip flexors.
tips: Kneel. Pull rope to floor. Round spine completely. Don't use hip flexors.

name: Wood Chop
instructions: Rotational movement. High to low and low to high variations.
tips: Rotational movement. High to low and low to high variations.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Back flat on floor. Opposite arm and leg extend slowly. Core braced.
tips: Back flat on floor. Opposite arm and leg extend slowly. Core braced.

name: Bird Dog
instructions: On all fours. Opposite arm and leg extend. Hips level.
tips: On all fours. Opposite arm and leg extend. Hips level.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Push-up position. Drive knees to chest alternately. Keep hips level.
tips: Push-up position. Drive knees to chest alternately. Keep hips level.

name: Hollow Hold
instructions: Shoulders and legs off floor. Press lower back down. Like a boat.
tips: Shoulders and legs off floor. Press lower back down. Like a boat.

name: Dragon Flag
instructions: Bruce Lee move. Straight body lowers from vertical. Extreme difficulty.
tips: Bruce Lee move. Straight body lowers from vertical. Extreme difficulty.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Anti-rotation exercise. Press cable out and bring back. Don't rotate.
tips: Anti-rotation exercise. Press cable out and bring back. Don't rotate.

name: Windshield Wiper
instructions: Hanging from bar or lying. Rotate legs side to side. Controlled.
tips: Hanging from bar or lying. Rotate legs side to side. Controlled.

name: Decline Sit-Up
instructions: Decline bench. Full ROM. Arms across chest or behind head.
tips: Decline bench. Full ROM. Arms across chest or behind head.

name: Reverse Crunch
instructions: Legs up, curl hips off floor. Don't use momentum. Posterior tilt.
tips: Legs up, curl hips off floor. Don't use momentum. Posterior tilt.

name: Landmine Rotation
instructions: Both hands on barbell end. Rotate from side to side. Hips still.
tips: Both hands on barbell end. Rotate from side to side. Hips still.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Bar padded on hips. Full hip extension. Chin tucked, ribs down.
tips: Bar padded on hips. Full hip extension. Chin tucked, ribs down.

name: Cable Pull-Through
instructions: Cable between legs. Hinge at hips. Squeeze glutes at top.
tips: Cable between legs. Hinge at hips. Squeeze glutes at top.

name: Frog Pump
instructions: On back, feet together soles touching. Pulse hips upward.
tips: On back, feet together soles touching. Pulse hips upward.

name: Fire Hydrant
instructions: On all fours. Lift leg to side like a dog at a fire hydrant.
tips: On all fours. Lift leg to side like a dog at a fire hydrant.

name: Clamshell
instructions: Lie on side, knees bent. Open top knee like a clamshell.
tips: Lie on side, knees bent. Open top knee like a clamshell.

name: Abductor Machine
instructions: Push pads outward. Full ROM. Slow controlled movement.
tips: Push pads outward. Full ROM. Slow controlled movement.

name: Adductor Machine
instructions: Push pads inward. Targets inner thighs.
tips: Push pads inward. Targets inner thighs.

name: Power Clean
instructions: Explosive pull from floor to rack position. Catch in partial squat.
tips: Explosive pull from floor to rack position. Catch in partial squat.

name: Hang Clean
instructions: Clean from hang position (above knee). Explosive hip drive.
tips: Clean from hang position (above knee). Explosive hip drive.

name: Power Snatch
instructions: Wide grip. Explosive pull from floor. Catch overhead with arms locked.
tips: Wide grip. Explosive pull from floor. Catch overhead with arms locked.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hip hinge, not squat. Explosive hip extension. Bell floats to shoulder height.
tips: Hip hinge, not squat. Explosive hip extension. Bell floats to shoulder height.

name: Kettlebell Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Complex multi-step movement. Keep bell overhead throughout. Slow and controlled.
tips: Complex multi-step movement. Keep bell overhead throughout. Slow and controlled.

name: Burpee
instructions: Squat, jump back to plank, push-up, jump feet to hands, jump up.
tips: Squat, jump back to plank, push-up, jump feet to hands, jump up.

name: Thruster
instructions: Front squat into overhead press in one fluid movement.
tips: Front squat into overhead press in one fluid movement.

name: Deadball Slam
instructions: Raise ball overhead, slam to ground with full force. Explosive.
tips: Raise ball overhead, slam to ground with full force. Explosive.

name: Battle Rope Waves
instructions: Simultaneous or alternating waves. Maintain athletic stance.
tips: Simultaneous or alternating waves. Maintain athletic stance.

name: Treadmill Run
instructions: Maintain conversational pace for aerobic base. Incline adds intensity.
tips: Maintain conversational pace for aerobic base. Incline adds intensity.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Drive with legs first, then lean back, then pull arms. 60% legs, 40% upper.
tips: Drive with legs first, then lean back, then pull arms. 60% legs, 40% upper.

name: Cycling
instructions: Low impact cardio. Adjust resistance for intensity.
tips: Low impact cardio. Adjust resistance for intensity.

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Step fully onto each stair. Don't lean heavily on handrails.
tips: Step fully onto each stair. Don't lean heavily on handrails.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Land softly on balls of feet. Keep elbows close to body.
tips: Land softly on balls of feet. Keep elbows close to body.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Land softly with bent knees. Step down (don't jump down).
tips: Land softly with bent knees. Step down (don't jump down).

name: Broad Jump
instructions: Horizontal jump. Maximum distance. Land and absorb softly.
tips: Horizontal jump. Maximum distance. Land and absorb softly.

name: Sprint Intervals
instructions: 30s sprint, 60-90s walk. Build aerobic and anaerobic capacity.
tips: 30s sprint, 60-90s walk. Build aerobic and anaerobic capacity.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Lunge position. Tuck pelvis under. Lean forward into stretch.
tips: Lunge position. Tuck pelvis under. Lean forward into stretch.

name: Pigeon Pose
instructions: Hip external rotation stretch. Hips square. Deep stretch.
tips: Hip external rotation stretch. Hips square. Deep stretch.

name: Thoracic Spine Rotation
instructions: On all fours or seated. Rotate upper back. Improve T-spine mobility.
tips: On all fours or seated. Rotate upper back. Improve T-spine mobility.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Lunge with twist. Elbow to floor. Reach overhead. Full body mobility.
tips: Lunge with twist. Elbow to floor. Reach overhead. Full body mobility.

name: Cat-Cow
instructions: On all fours. Arch and round spine slowly. Warm up spinal mobility.
tips: On all fours. Arch and round spine slowly. Warm up spinal mobility.

name: Ankle Circles
instructions: Rotate ankle through full ROM. Improve ankle mobility for squatting.
tips: Rotate ankle through full ROM. Improve ankle mobility for squatting.
